archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for Luxury Tech (Apple/Stripe inspired)

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tighter leading-tight

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass: bg-[#0A0A0A]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5
surface_strategies.cards: Solid surface #121212 with 1px border-white/5. Hover effect: subtle lift -translate-y-1 and glow shadow.
surface_strategies.buttons: Primary: bg-[#FFFFFF] text-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-gray-200 transition-all. Secondary/Accent: bg-[#3B82F6] text-white hover:bg-blue-600 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.3)].

animations.scroll: Smooth scrolling using Lenis (if available, else smooth CSS). Elements fade-in and translate-y-4 on scroll.
animations.hover_state: All interactive elements must have transition-all duration-300. Cards should subtle scale (1.02) and borders illuminate.

components_instructions.hero: Center aligned. Overline text 'Chetna AI Studio'. Massive H1. CTA buttons. Below text, an animated mockup image floating with a subtle blue under-glow.
components_instructions.problem_story: Use overlapping sticky cards or a vertical timeline to show the 'Bad Design Costs You Money' story.
components_instructions.solution_3_step: 3-column grid. Minimalist icons. Tracing beam / glowing border effect on cards.
components_instructions.services: Bento Grid layout (Mode A). 4 categories: Core Web Design (span 2), Branding (span 1), Growth (span 1), Automation (span 2).
components_instructions.portfolio: High-quality project images in a responsive grid. Hover reveals 'View Case Study'. Slider for Before/After if feasible, otherwise side-by-side.
components_instructions.offer_section: High contrast section. Highlight the 'Starter Package'. Strikethrough ₹15,000, prominent ₹4,999. Urgency/Scarcity text below CTA.
components_instructions.testimonials: Carousel or horizontal scroll. Clean avatars. 5-star icons.
components_instructions.floating_elements: Floating WhatsApp button bottom-right (green or brand blue). Sticky bottom CTA on mobile viewports for high conversion.
components_instructions.forms: Minimalist lead capture form (Name, Email, Phone, Needs) styled with Shadcn UI but customized for dark theme. Submit buttons redirect to WhatsApp.

testing.attributes: Ensure all interactive elements (buttons, form inputs, toggles, chatbot triggers) include data-testid attributes formatted in kebab-case based on their role (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='whatsapp-floating-button').
